creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 171630
Proposed patch (since 409338 revision)

Patch to update deskutils/treesheets port from 0.0.20160130 to 0.0.20160612 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/aardappel/treesheets/compare/ba34531...c5fb4d0

- Add default values for EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS variable
- Add desktop-file-utils to USES
- Install available treesheets.desktop file

The build tested on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64.
